title: Attempt GitHub OAuth secret rotation via API

log.context: Attempt GitHub OAuth secret rotation via API

Here is the full picture:

---

**What was tried and what the results were:**

1. **`gh auth status`** — Authenticated as `bigclungus` with token scopes: `gist`, `project`, `read:org`, `repo`. No `admin:*` scopes.

2. **`/user/installations`** — 403. Requires a GitHub App token, not a user OAuth token.
